It is the GREEN step that should close out the hygiene test (01KPEM811W5XE6WVHDQVRCZ4B0).

+### Scope
+
+- Automated: a single integration test file that walks every entity type through its cross-cutting commands and asserts both surface (context-menu emission) and execute (dispatch produces the expected state change or a documented error).
+- Manual: a quick smoke checklist the implementer runs in `kanban-app` and captures in the task notes before marking done.

+
+| Entity      | delete | archive | unarchive | copy | cut | paste |
+|-------------|--------|---------|-----------|------|-----|-------|

+| column      | yes    | —       | —         | —    | —   | yes (target for task paste) |
+| actor       | yes    | —       | —         | —    | —   | —     |
+| attachment  | delete (type-specific via attachment.yaml) | — | — | — | — | — |
+| board       | —      | —       | —         | —    | —   | yes (target for task paste) |
+

+

+
+- [ ] Write the matrix test, one `#[tokio::test]` per row or one table-driven test per column — whichever gives clearer failure output.

+- [ ] Manual: start the dev app, create a board with at least one of each entity type, right-click each, verify the context menu items listed in the matrix and that they execute.
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Use `/tdd` — write the matrix test before touching any remaining YAML/Rust; it should reveal any gaps the prior cards didn't close.
+- Follow the `really-done` skill before marking complete — evidence before assertions.

| Entity      | delete | archive | unarchive | copy | cut | paste |

| task        | yes    | yes     | yes       | yes  | yes | yes (into column/board) |

| board       | —      | —       | —         | —    | —   | yes (target for task paste) |
